tuning: E A D G B E
content:
For this tab, strum the chords at the exact point in the sentence that I wrote the 
chord, as it fits very well.


Capo 2

OPTIONAL INTRO
I know that we are young.
 And I know you may love me.
 But I just can't be with you like this anymore.
 Alejandro.
 
VERSE 1
[tab]          [ch]Am[/ch]
She's got both hands[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]C[/ch] 
in her pocket.[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]G[/ch] 
And she won't look at you,[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]Em[/ch] 
Won't look at you[/tab]
     
[tab]     [ch]Am[/ch]
She hides true love[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]C[/ch] 
En su bolsillo.[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]G[/ch]
She's got a halo 'around her finger.[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Em[/ch] 
Around you.[/tab]

[tab][ch]F[/ch]
You know that I love you boy.[/tab]

[tab]     [ch]G[/ch]     
It's at this point I gotta choose,[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]Em[/ch] 
nothing to loose.[/tab]
